name: IDA奖（国际设计奖）
home_text:
IDA 2026 IS NOW OPEN - SUBMIT BY MAY 15 TO GET A 5% EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT.
IDA 2026 IS OPEN FOR SUBMISSIONS!

Submit your best work to the International Design Awards and gain global recognition.
Extended Early Bird deadline: May 15. Get 5% off your entry fee.

SUBMIT NOW
19TH ANNUAL IDA AWARDS GALA RECAP
February 8, 2026 | ICONSIAM, Bangkok, Thailand

From February 6–8, Bangkok welcomed designers, artists, and visionaries from around the world for a dynamic celebration of creativity and innovation.

The highlight was the 19th International Design Awards Ceremony and Gala at ICONSIAM’s River Park, where guests gathered for a red carpet reception and awards dinner honoring this year’s outstanding designers.

Leading up to the Gala, visitors participated in the IDA Design Talks & Symposium, sharing insights and perspectives on design. The celebration continued with a Networking Party at Lost in Songwat, connecting award winners, partners, and Bangkok’s creative community.

A curated photo collection captures the spirit and special moments of the event, available through the links below.

Networking Party
Gala Awards Ceremony
19th Annual International Design Awards

Past year the IDA has introduced NEW categories to acknowledge the evolution of the design industry across architecture, interior, product, graphic and fashion design disciplines.

THE IDA 2025 WINNERS ARE HERE!
Inviting all architects, interior designers, product designers, graphic designers and fashion designers to submit their creative works into one of THE most respected design awards in the world. Receive worldwide recognition for your creative projects!
